description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin set on a grassy plot bordered by a neat row of evergreen trees. The cabin features horizontally laid wooden planks for its walls and a simple gable roof with a black chimney protruding from one side. The front facade has a single wooden door with a small set of steps leading up to it, and a stone statue or figure is placed on a paved path in front of the entrance. The windows are minimal, with only one small window visible on the front side next to the door. The surrounding landscape is well-maintained, with a uniform arrangement of coniferous trees and a mowed grass lawn. The overall appearance suggests a cozy, traditional log cabin suitable for residential or recreational use.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, surrounded by evenly spaced evergreen trees and a grassy lawn, featuring a single front door and minimal windows.
description_view_0: The rear of the cabin is visible, showing the wooden plank wall and a row of evergreen trees lining the property.
description_view_1: A side view of the cabin highlights the gable roof and the symmetrical arrangement of trees along both sides.
description_view_2: The opposite rear side of the cabin is shown, with the wooden wall and more evergreen trees, and the stone statue is partially visible.
description_view_3: The front of the cabin is visible, featuring the main entrance door, a small window, a paved path, and a stone statue in the yard.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, constructed from wooden planks and featuring a single chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: One small rectangular window on the front facade, asymmetrically placed next to the door; no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade, accessed by a short paved path
